steps.title: Identify two clear points on the line of best fit
steps.content: Looking at the line, it passes through two easily readable points: the y-intercept at $(0, 8)$ and the point at $(10, 1)$.

steps.title: Calculate slope using the rise-over-run formula
steps.content:
Apply the slope formula $m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1}$. Substituting $(0, 8)$ and $(10, 1)$:
$$m = \frac{1 - 8}{10 - 0} = \frac{-7}{10} = -0.7$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
